## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional changes)

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran. If following TDD, mention Red-Green-Refactor cycle -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] DOM tests pass (`pnpm test:dom`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`pnpm build`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's architecture (Clean Architecture by module)
- [ ] I ran tests before and after my changes
- [ ] I followed the TDD cycle (Red-Green-Refactor) for new behavior
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] I did not add AI attribution or Co-Authored-By to commits
- [ ] I did NOT modify existing database migrations (created new ones if needed)
